message:
I am thinking...: I have successfully created the core configuration and initial files for the restaurant management application. Based on the scratchpad, I have completed the following:
- Configuration: package.json, tsconfig.json, next.config.js, prisma/schema.prisma
- Core: src/app/layout.tsx, src/app/page.tsx, src/app/globals.css, src/app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts
- Utilities: src/lib/prisma.ts, src/lib/auth.ts
- Components: src/components/Navbar.tsx, src/components/RestaurantCard.tsx, src/components/MenuItemForm.tsx, src/components/OrderTable.tsx
- Pages/Routes: src/app/auth/login/page.tsx, src/app/auth/register/page.tsx, src/app/api/restaurants/route.ts, src/app/api/menu/route.ts, src/app/api/orders/route.ts, src/app/dashboard/page.tsx, src/app/menu/page.tsx, src/app/orders/page.tsx
- Middleware/Env: src/middleware.ts, .env.example

The scratchpad indicates all files have been created. I should now verify the state of the project by running a build or checking if there are any missing pieces. Since I cannot run a full build without installing dependencies, I will check if `node_modules` exists or if I need to run `npm install`.

Wait, the instructions say "Do NOT re-read files you already created — trust your prior writes." and "After ALL files are created, do a single verification pass."

I have created all files. I will now run `npm install` to ensure the environment is ready.
